subject: Business Studies
chapter: Social Responsibilities of Business and Business Ethics

remember: Students will be able to recall the different types of social responsibilities of business.
Students will be able to identify the importance of business ethics in corporate world.
Students will be able to list out the different factors influencing business ethics.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of social responsibility of business in the context of globalisation.
Students will be able to describe the role of business in promoting social welfare.
Students will be able to discuss the importance of corporate social responsibility in today's business scenario.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of social responsibility in real-life business situations.
Students will be able to suggest strategies for promoting business ethics in an organisation.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of business decisions on the society.
analyze: Students will be able to analyse the role of business in promoting social welfare in a developing country.
Students will be able to compare the social responsibilities of different types of business organisations.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of business ethics in an organisation.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of social responsibility of business and its importance in the modern business scenario.
List out the different types of social responsibilities of business and discuss their importance.
Describe the role of business in promoting social welfare and discuss the factors influencing business ethics.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of corporate social responsibility and its importance in India.
Describe the factors influencing business ethics and evaluate their impact on an organisation.
Compare the social responsibilities of different types of business organisations and suggest strategies for promoting business ethics.
